entry.title: Lego Star Wars: The Complete Saga v1.4.1
entry.content:
This release is fully compatible with seeds generated by v1.4.0.
# Fixes
When reloading the Cantina to change Qui-Gon/Obi-Wan to unlocked characters, fix being able to pick Qui-Gon/Obi-Wan for both characters.
Fix Chapter Requirements Display not working when starting a session for an in-progress multiworld from the existing save file.
Fix entering a Chapter door, cancelling, and then re-entering causing "Story" to be selected instead of Free Play.
# Changes
Small updates to the documentation that were missed in v1.4.0.

entry.title: Borderlands 2 v74
entry.content:
Want to test on the frontlines? Get the latest developments here. Higher likelihood of showstopping issues. Good luck out there, Slab!
setup instructions on the home page and [readme](https://github.com/EdricY/Bouncy-Loot-God/blob/main/README.md)
[sample yamls](https://github.com/EdricY/Bouncy-Loot-God/tree/main/sample-yamls)
new stuff (since 0.5.2): * reorder headhunters for progressive order * new oasis ramp * option to remove locations: story quests or side quests * option to remove easily missable locations * 30% Omnd-Omnd-Ohk spawn rate in hunters grotto and scyllas grove * get talon of god check to send * allow selection of multiple goals * BAR Challenge checks toggleable by type (region-based or general) * include_locations option * in-game option to disable loot collision * assassinate the assassins always repeatable (easier to do Compl33tionist) * spawn more enemies in windshear waste (easier to do a bunch of combat challenges) * gear items/locations renamed: `VeryRare SMG` -> `License: VeryRare SMG` and `VeryRare SMG Found`

entry.title: shapez 2 v1.0.1
entry.content:
# Changelog
- Fixed UT rejecting any slot
### Is this version compatible with older multiworld slots? Manual-like client yes, back to 0.99.0 (will be deprecated soon though) UT will probably be inaccurate for worlds generated prior to 1.0.0

entry.title: TOEM: A Photo Adventure v2.0.4
entry.content:
Changes:
- Bugfix: Fix a regression in deferred entrances - Bugfix: Correct a logic bug with the Sandwich item's location
Randomizer details: https://github.com/bbernardoni/Archipelago/blob/toem/worlds/toem/docs/en_TOEM.md Setup guide: https://github.com/bbernardoni/Archipelago/blob/toem/worlds/toem/docs/setup_en.md

entry.title: Ori and the Will of the Wisps v0.5.4
entry.content: - Fix non-deterministic issues with region and combat requirements. - Fix the combat logic being wrong sometimes (and in a non-deterministic way). - The trap items in shops should now use the filler icon instead of a random one.

entry.title: ULTRAKILL v3.5.0
entry.content: - Re-added random music. - Random music can now be re-randomized or toggled off while playing. - When random music is enabled, a popup will appear when a new randomized song starts playing. This can be disabled in the options. - Added counts for weapons and secret weapons to the act summary.

entry.title: Okami HD v0.3.3
entry.content:
# Okami HD APWorld 0.3.3
## What's Changed * Cherry pick old fixes by @Ragmoa in https://github.com/Ragmoa/Archipelago/pull/14 * fix Python 3.11 Type generic by @Ragmoa in https://github.com/Ragmoa/Archipelago/pull/15 * Generation compatibility for client v0.7.X by @Axertin in https://github.com/Ragmoa/Archipelago/pull/13 * Better rules by @Ragmoa in https://github.com/Ragmoa/Archipelago/pull/16 * Client 0.7.1 compat by @Ragmoa in https://github.com/Ragmoa/Archipelago/pull/17
## New Contributors * @Axertin made their first contribution in https://github.com/Ragmoa/Archipelago/pull/13
**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/Ragmoa/Archipelago/compare/0.3.1...0.3.3

entry.title: YARG v0.0.14
entry.content:
# Use Client Version 0.0.5+. No Client Update Required!
New: - Support for YARG Official Setlist Wave 15
## What's Changed * Added YARG Setlist Wave 15 by @energymaster22 in https://github.com/energymaster22/YARGArchipelago/pull/31
**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/energymaster22/YARGArchipelago/compare/0.0.13...0.0.14

entry.title: CrossCode v0.8.2
entry.content:
## Changes to Mod
* Added several sanity checks when connecting to the server, including (@CodeTriangle): * was the world generated with a future version of the apworld? * is the game's seed the same as the one this game was previously connected to? * is the game's slot number the same as the on this game was previously connected to?
## Fixes to Mod * Fixed an issue where all but the first instance of disconnection from the login dialog would erroneously notify the player of an unplanned disconnection (@CodeTriangle).

entry.title: CrossCode v0.9.0rc1
entry.content:
## Additions
* Added support for **Botanics** (@CodeTriangle): * If enabled, acquiring all the information about each plant by collecting drops is a location. * Enable the `botanity` option to use this feature. * Along with this, you can also change how many plants are required to complete **Crocus Pocus** and the three intermediary locations. * Added support for the **A New Home** expansion (@kumquat-ir): * Chests, quests, cutscenes, and shops added by the DLC are all now available as potential locations. * Enable the `enable_dlc` option to use this feature. * A new goal has been added (`diorbis`) that requires the player to descend Ku'lero Temple.
## Migration Guide
I **do not** recommend migrating to this release if you started your save file on 0.8.x or earlier.

entry.title: Ratchet & Clank 3 v0.5.3
entry.content:
## RaC3 APWorld v0.5.3 **Branch:** staging **Date:** 2026-04-25 15:02 UTC
📜 Summary (269 changes since v0.5.2) - RAC3: Make nanotech exp filler scale with your current nanotech exp rather than being random (05d09171d) - RAC3: Make vendor messages less likely to get eaten (b0ed043e0) - RAC3: Add min/avg/max in cycle benchmark in rac3_info (0f303800e) - RAC3: Added Arena tag to Phoenix: Return after winning Grand Prize Bout check (e722215a3) - RAC3: Adjust the default filler and trap weights to more closely fitting with the needs of the vendor update (2b617f70d) - RAC3: Rename skin to player skin (7eba16f70) - RAC3: Rename Player EXP to Nanotech EXP, yaml cleanup. (d2f5bcd31) - RAC3: Add a 1 second grace period to deathlink (c88c837b1) - RAC3: Let the user know that death link is off if it is off when using /kill (5a24572f8) - RAC3: Fix Pulsing Purple and Obani Orange being swapped (407e29ac8) - RAC3: Allow US GH version to use NTSC patches (55f674d1b) - RAC3: Remove most debug logs that run every cycle (202fcae3c) - RAC3: Remove spammy debug log statements (8af7ad8c7) - RAC3: Run Ruff Formatter (57ecff777) - RAC3: Remove the no tyhrraguise phoenix thing (a7e2d231e) - RAC3: Adjust Sasha Pos and Range failsafe (d18c5bf0e) - RAC3: Add failsafe for Meet Sasha Bridge (34c5c75f0) - RAC3: Make deathlink kill rules more strict (4054285f2) - RAC3: Make deathlink toggle message white (f89d6bd03) - RAC3: Add the number 38 to all items purchased message (fb38e5866) - RAC3: Fix deathlink on/off message using default theme (846a58bcd) - RAC3: Add softlocked as a death reason to deathlink (b379231a8) - RAC3: Add average cycle time to /rac3_info (aaaacbe16) - RAC3: Add /ryno output to ingame notifications (19fc0b01d) - RAC3: Remove potential confusion about all items purchased (6eb43ca97) - RAC3: Use RAC3POSITIONDATA for distance checks (4078ca5fd) - RAC3: Don't even attempt to apply PAL patches on NTSC and vice versa (44eb1fe94) - RAC3: Refactor patches again (f4a884000) - RAC3: Cleanup no longer used status constants (bb3232c45) - RAC3: Formatting (6bfbe0d28) - RAC3: Added Active Patches to rac3_info (18b2db834) - RAC3: Normalize hurt/damaged state names (1bf3880e6) - RAC3: Use constant from version rather than hard coded magic number (de9613ca9) - RAC3: Let the user know that they have purchased all items in the ship vendor if they have done so (c4a99002d) - RAC3: Fix type hinting on scout_vendors (d9b151aa5) - RAC3: Clean up new AN Vidcomic 2 fix (d833b49a9) - RAC3: Refactor: Player Action and Action Type (e1b0d371a) - RAC3: Fix holostar warning causing next notification to also be 8 seconds (d117c4de8) - RAC3: Hide the vid comic when paused (f653c1d83) - RAC3: Use is_location_checked to ensure it still works even with AN off (d7f7d3e62) - RAC3: Give the player vid comic 2 while on AN if they have completed first challenge (5c7297a6c) - RAC3: Implement logic fixes and suggestions (255377320) - RAC3: Update location names to match new price curve (8115a99f8) - RAC3: Made ship skins start price 14k instead of 10k (28707c927) - RAC3: Mention PAL in the setup guide and add a section for charge boots in the FAQ (eac523a50)\n- ...and 69 more commits.
**Full changelog and compare**: https://github.com/Taoshix/Archipelago-RaC3/compare/v0.5.2...v0.5.3 ### [Setup Guide](https://github.com/Taoshix/Archipelago-RaC3/blob/staging/worlds/rac3/docs/setup_en.md) ### Notes This release was automatically generated from the **staging** branch. Latest (main) releases are recommended, as pre-releases (staging) may contain experimental or in-progress changes. ### If a location is broken and does not get sent out Go to the server console (locally or via the Archipelago room page) and run: `/send_location ` Example: `/send_location TaoshiRaC3 "Crash Site: Infobot: Aridia"`

entry.title: Factorio Bob's v2.1.5
entry.content:
Big thanks to @Enderdraak (CosmicWolf) most of this update (and discovering the bugs that I also fixed in this update) They have not only managed to refactor the whole of the factorio ap mod produced by the world (for future adaptability and hopefully debuggability) they have implement Technology Obscurity, local item handling and obtained new icons made by Ruby3440 and then modified further by myself and CosmicWolf to replace the generic archipelago ones.
I'm still working on the apworld I've just been busy recently and getting burned out working on the 3rd recipe engine.
# Changelog: - Refactored the mod done by @Enderdraak - Added Technology Obscurity by @Enderdraak - Makes it so only next technologies are visible and hinted if tech tree information is enabled with configurable depth - Added local item handling by @Enderdraak - Enables easier solo games - Changed the uses of the AP logo to a factorio styled version - Implemented by @Enderdraak and designed by Ruby3440 - Added an Icon to all progressive items by @Enderdraak - Technology tree shapes now use seeded random - Is it UT compatible now? - Readded grenade trap item preventing a generator crash with option - Gets used so little CosmicWolf only recently noticed I forgot to add the item - `is_valid_first_pool` option in facpacks are now actually used again

entry.title: Corn Kidz 64 v0.0.6
entry.content:
- Added Ally Picture Check - **Multiple Goals** can now be selected - Note: the option was also renamed from `goal` to `goal_selection` - Added new option **Switchsanity** - This adds the 4 Switches for the door to Dog God in Some Other Place to item/location pool - Added new option **Test Cubesanity** - This adds the 25 Test Cube from the Test Zone to item/location pool - Div. logic fixes: - Fixed zoo rat 2 requirements - Fixed VoidScrewHollowSky missing Slam requirement - Fixed MirrorHollowZooSideCrank requirement - Fixed CubeParkSlide requirement - Fixed MonsterParkHouseFoyer access requirements - Fix some UT issues - Added archipelago.json - Switched to Rule Builder
**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/Cyb3RGER/cornkidz64_apworld/compare/v0.0.5...v0.0.6

entry.title: Bloons TD6 v0.6.0
entry.content: - Added Upgrade Sanity Option - Logic for pop tier checks behind locked upgrades added

entry.title: Scooby-Doo! Night of 100 Frights v1
entry.content:
# QOL Fix Release
- Fixes some logic issues in DaSK regarding backtracking without springs - Fixes Memory Reads in Cower in the Tower causing level to lock up

entry.title: Black Ops 3 - Zombies v0.5.1
entry.content:
Mod update only, no apworld update
- Origins: - Exit teleporters are now restored - QoL: After all staffs are placed, all 3 giants will have a hatch until the g-strike hole is blown open - Player Save Additions: - Has Shovel / Golden Shovel / Golden Helmet - Number of spots dug - Streak of bad dig rewards (3 losses means next dig spot is 100% a win) - **Note:** Zombie Blood Dig Spots with Golden Shovel will currently not be restored - Locked wallbuys now show a neon red padlock symbol over them

entry.title: Crypt of the NecroDancer v0.6.0
entry.content:
### Changes - Add Traplink support to the AP World - Add in 61 new traps, totalling traps to 71. Considering reducing/genericizing traps in the future, as many traps are similar in scope (summoning enemies, changing tempo, etc.) - Add in sending apworld version number to the mod for easy reference when connected (mod now shows this in the bottom left instead of "AP Connected". - Support sending server commands from the Redux mod (used to just support plaintext messaging) - Store CotND goal completion data in data storage as opposed to allowing the mod to consider goal progression on location checks - Multiply default TrapWeights weights by 10 for decimal weight support
Please see the [setup file](https://github.com/lastingParadox/Archipelago-CotND/blob/crypt-of-the-necrodancer/worlds/cotnd/docs/setup_en.md) for getting started.
Please inform me of any issues through the associated [Crypt of the NecroDancer channel in the Archipelago Discord](https://discord.com/channels/731205301247803413/1192775219740422176) or through [GitHub Issues](https://github.com/lastingParadox/Archipelago-CotND/issues).

entry.title: Minecraft Fabric v1.1.0
entry.content:
Modded is still very early expect the possibility of
- Cyan, Lime, Green, and Brown dyes now exclude when either Dyed Items or Exploration Items are excluded rather than both - Fixed Logic Error for Gold and Iron Weapons - Changed Logic for a few golden items to account for Nether Gold Ore - Added Mod support for the following mods: - Create - Healing Pretty Good - Iron Chests: Restocked

entry.title: Cuphead v0.2.16908543
entry.content:
### Requires Archipelago 0.6.7! #### This is a prerelease which means that bugs have probably made a home in this build!
Hot Dog! Another big update!
See more information about this mod (bugs, workarounds, configs, etc) in the [Cuphead channel](https://discord.com/channels/731205301247803413/1497318235438186566) in the Archipelago Discord.
*Note: Some YAML settings have changed format, check your yaml!*
WARNING: This is in alpha, just be aware that bugs do live in things that are in alpha!
**NOTE: This is not compatible with any apworld version older than alpha03 including prelease versions of alpha03!**
### What's new in alpha03?
- Rewritten logic! - Better Logic! - Chalice logic with double jump is implemented! - Partial hard logic (it works, but only a handful of stuffs has harder logic. More to come!) - Yet Another Project Restructure with cleaner logic code and better maintainability. (geek stuffs) - Universal tracker support! - Support for not starting with a weapon. - Lots of Logic and APWorld bugs fixed! - Even more!
Have fun, and take care!

entry.title: TOEM: A Photo Adventure v2.0.5
entry.content:
Changes:
- No client mod change from 2.0.4 - Bugfix: Prevent occasionally generating an impossible Basto ER
Randomizer details: https://github.com/bbernardoni/Archipelago/blob/toem/worlds/toem/docs/en_TOEM.md Setup guide: https://github.com/bbernardoni/Archipelago/blob/toem/worlds/toem/docs/setup_en.md

entry.title: Borderlands 2 v75
entry.content:
Want to test on the frontlines? Get the latest developments here. Higher likelihood of showstopping issues. Good luck out there, Slab!
setup instructions on the home page and [readme](https://github.com/EdricY/Bouncy-Loot-God/blob/main/README.md)
[sample yamls](https://github.com/EdricY/Bouncy-Loot-God/tree/main/sample-yamls)
new stuff (since 0.5.2): * reorder headhunters for progressive order * new oasis ramp * option to remove locations: story quests or side quests * option to remove easily missable locations * 30% Omnd-Omnd-Ohk spawn rate in hunters grotto and scyllas grove * get talon of god check to send * allow selection of multiple goals * BAR Challenge checks toggleable by type (region-based or general) * include_locations option * in-game option to disable loot collision * assassinate the assassins always repeatable (easier to do Compl33tionist) * spawn more enemies in windshear waste (easier to do a bunch of combat challenges) * gear items/locations renamed: `VeryRare SMG` -> `License: VeryRare SMG` and `VeryRare SMG Found`

entry.title: Plants vs. Zombies: Replanted v1.7.1
entry.content:
- Fixes inaccuracies with Universal Tracker. - Fixes a crash that could occur when playing ZomBotany.
For instructions, see the [Setup Guide.](https://github.com/dannybonz/replanted_archipelago/blob/main/apworld/docs/setup.md)

entry.title: The Legend of Zelda - Phantom Hourglass v0.9.1a0
entry.content:
Compatible with seeds generated in v9.0+ [Setup Guide](https://github.com/carrotinator/Archipelago/blob/main/worlds/tloz_ph/docs/setup.md)
- Fixed crash from improper traveling ship entrance rando assignment - Phantom Hourglass item now has a model - Prevented ship items from giving a free cannon - Fixed Cyclone Slate not sending, and added extra safety just in case - Tried something to fix the Oshus softlock - Fixed crash from reloading client in rooms with close chest reads - Prevented client from trying to remove non-existent boss key actors - Added killing goron chus with just hammer to glitched logic - Added more precise stage flag setting, skipping panning cutscenes on new islands consistently and preventing eye beast fight on first ocean visit - Warp to start no longer cancels randomly on exiting the collection screen - Drinking potions during the Bellumbeck fight no longer sends the goal

entry.title: SMW: Spicy Mycena Waffles v1.3.4
entry.content: Something(tm) broke, not what I needed (to see). # Info * [Information](https://thelx5.github.io/smw/) * [Full Changelog](https://thelx5.github.io/smw/changelog/#1.3.4) # Changes * Potentially fixed "Out of Logic" level clears in Universal Tracker * Please use `"default"` setting for deferred entrances in Universal Tracker! * Fixed fireballs not bouncing on the ground * Fixed FoI4 secret exit access rule

entry.title: Metroid Zero Mission v0.5.3
entry.content: Quick item sprite hotfix: * Added item sprites for Samus Returns * Added item sprites for progression variants of Map Rando missile/super/power bomb tanks * Fixed Wall Jump being orange instead of the intended white

entry.title: Casualties: Unknown v0.9.3
entry.content:
### Casualties: Unknown Archipelago v0.9.3 This update is compatible with worlds generated on versions v0.9.0 and above!
For instructions on how to set up and play this mod, check the [README](https://github.com/Nichologeam/CUAP/blob/master/README.md). Development on the Itch.io version of Casualties: Unknown has stopped. To play this mod on the Itch.io version, use CUAP v0.8.0.
# Additions - Universal Tracker support! Moodlesanity Questboard will no longer show incorrect moodles inside of UT [APWorld Change] # Changes - Archipelago Item descriptions now show an item's classification color - The "Moodlesanity Questboard Cooldown Time" YAML option can now be disabled entierly [APWorld Change] - The "Moodlesanity Exclusions" presets now must be in uppercase. This might break some pre-existing YAMLs! [APWorld Change] # Fixes - Fixed a missing space in the minigame locked popups - Actually fixed `Moodlesanity - Internal bleeding` this time - Optomised Archipelago Items code to cause less lag on lower end devices - Fixed the game mod thinking there was one more Archipelago Item than was set in the YAML, causing an empty item to spawn - Fixed Archipelago Items retaining their name and description after running out of locations instead of reverting to INT Experience Bundle items - Fixed Archipelago Items turning themselves back on after returning to the main menu # Known Issues - A NullReferenceException is sometimes thrown when the Layer Selector opens. This seems to be an issue with how Harmony interacts with Prefix patches on IEnumerators - If more than one Archipelago Item exists, they will all share the same sprite and description. This is a limitation of the original game, and will not be fixed - Craftsanity checks will still be sent if crafting fails due to low INT. This is a bug in the original game, and will not be fixed
**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/Nichologeam/CUAP/compare/v0.9.2...v0.9.3

entry.title: Black Ops 3 - Zombies v0.5.4
entry.content:
This version of the mod is also compatible with lower 0.5 releases.
Reminder that Moon and Origins do not currently have Easter Egg Checkpoints. You must use round or token checkpoints.
**Apworld:** - New Option - Start with Super EE Reward - Starting RK5 - *Starting Pistol Max Ammo is not implemented yet* - Decreased number of rounds in logic given by weapon unlocks by 33% - Added 3 perk requirement to logically access round 18 on maps with more than 5 perks
**Mod:** - Prevent Mystery Box being spun and giving a random map weapon when no more unlocked weapons are available - *This behaviour does not work on Origins* - Solo Quick Revive no longer turns off after 3 uses - Remove perk weighting for Wunderfizz on Der Eisendrache, Gorod Krovi, Revelations and Origins - Der Eisendrache - Dr Groph should no longer have repeating story or round based voiceover during late game restoration - Zetsubou No Shima - If not brought in gobblegum pack, Anywhere But Here is added to an invisible 6th slot instead of overwriting the 5th slot - Archipelago Shop added to Moon and Origins
**Known Issues:** - Shop Token count can show incorrectly on the client. You can still purchase the item if you have a token, even if the shop visually says otherwise. - Weapons restore with max ammo.

entry.title: Pizza Tower v1.3.0
entry.content:
# Pizza Tower Archipelago v1.3.0 [Setup](https://github.com/unsafetyskizzers/Archipelago/blob/pizza_ap/worlds/pizza_tower/docs/setup_en.md) | [Mod Page](https://gamebanana.com/mods/598236)
It's been quite a bit but we've got a new update ready! This is an update for both the game mod and APWorld, so check that both are up-to-date, and don't forget to update your YAML as well.
Here are all the changes and bugfixes:
Changes: - Added Kill Snotty as a new completion goal - Added an optional Enemy Randomizer setting - The title screen now shows how many Archipelago saves you have and will allow you to clean the folder from within the game - Updated the granny sign to show all checked locations for each level on the floor - Rank locations checked by a collect won't trigger other location checks - Credits can now be skipped earlier - The jumpscare trap is now part of the trap weights instead of being a separate option. It's set to 0 by default - The Pizza Tower text client now shows a tab for Universal Tracker if you have it installed - Pizzaface now speeds up when you receive another deathlink while he's active - The game will now fully resync your items with the server state on connect - Toppins and Pumpkins are now tagged as "deprioritized"
Fixes: - Fix softlock on Pizzaface if you're playing swap mode and don't have Noise's bomb - Fix issue where the game wasn't notified that Deathlink and Ringlink are enabled under certain circumstances - Fix issue where generation would fail if the toppin or pumpkin amount was set to 0 - Fix issue where packets sent in very close proximity would sometimes not process - Fix issue where the location group names for DMAS and WAR's chef tasks didn't match the actual location names - Lots of logic fixes and other minor bugfixes

entry.title: TOEM: A Photo Adventure v2.0.6
entry.content:
Changes:
- No client mod change from 2.0.4 - Bugfix: Fix bad new version usage preventing connect
Randomizer details: https://github.com/bbernardoni/Archipelago/blob/toem/worlds/toem/docs/en_TOEM.md Setup guide: https://github.com/bbernardoni/Archipelago/blob/toem/worlds/toem/docs/setup_en.md

entry.title: The Legend of Zelda - Spirit Tracks v0.7.5
entry.content:
Compatible with seeds generated in v0.7.x [Setup guide and useful info](https://github.com/DayKat/spirit-tracks/blob/main/worlds/tloz_st/docs/setup.md)
- Added missing location: `ToS 29F SE Extinguish Torches Chest` - Added option for generic multiworld item models, with options force gems, letters and rupees - Fixed /goal crash with a dungeon goal - Fixed crash from getting tear of light in certain circumstances - Prevented stalfos skulls from triggering locations on ToS 28F and Desert Temple B1 - Changed default keyring option to no_keyrings - Fixed Anouki Chief not giving location if visited Icy Spring - Prevented small keys from underflowing - Preventing warp to start from resetting the train after a client restart - Fixed the boss key locations in Tower of Spirits - Forest Glyph now displays the correct model - Added missing model for Sand Realm Tracks

entry.title: Total War Warhammer 3 v0.9.5
entry.content:
IF THIS DOESN'T WORK, USE V0.9.4. Test this before joining a multiworld.
Reworked backend rules generation. Reworked options to simplify generation. Changeling might work in conquest mode now.
Merged Mechanic Debuffs and Tech Requirements into a single QOL .pack for convenience.
Installation instructions can be found [here](https://github.com/jordansds/Archipelago_TWW3_Alt/blob/main/README.md). [FAQ](https://github.com/jordansds/Archipelago_TWW3_Alt/blob/main/FAQ.md).
**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/jordansds/Archipelago_TWW3_Alt/compare/v0.9.4...v0.9.5

entry.title: Bloons TD6 v0.6.1
entry.content: - Added custom rounds option for round sanity

entry.title: ULTRAKILL v3.5.1
entry.content: - Fixed 1-4: V2's Arm not having any logic. - Added coins back to glass breaking logic, and screwdriver to glass and wall breaking logic. - The intro in 0-1 will now be skipped if the level has been completed, instead of checking for if the player has the Piercer revolver. - Re-added tutorial prompt when clicking 0-1 in level select.

entry.title: The Simpsons Hit And Run v0.5.0b0
entry.content:
APWorld entirely rewritten. Lots of bug, logic, and efficiency improvements.
New stuff:
- Goal yaml option is now titled "Itchy_And_Scratchy_Ticket_Requirement" - Added new goal option "Cars Collected" where cars act as a macguffin - Wasps and Cards goal removed - can now be paired with other goals separately (can choose exact amount instead of percent) - Reworked shop scale modifier (purchases scale higher in-game) - Added "Required_Mission_Levels" yaml option to make story goal requirements only require certain levels - Added "Lock_Levels" yaml option to make Free Roam inaccessible in levels you haven't received yet. - Added "Early_Level" yaml option to try to place at least one level item early. - Added "Mission_Timers" yaml option to adjust timers in missions up or down. - Added "Filler_Wrench_Efficiency" and "Filler_HitNRun_Reset_Efficiency" yaml options. These set the percent of the car hp/hnr gauge they restore. - Added "Traffic_Blacklist" to set certain cars to never show in randomized traffic - Fixed trap enabling options to only add traps if they're enabled - Fixed UT issues showing incorrect missions/wasps/cards - Greatly improved generation times

entry.title: The Simpsons Hit And Run v0.5.0
entry.content: Really fixed UT error for really real

entry.title: The Simpsons Hit And Run v0.5.0
entry.content: Fixed an issue that prevented UT gen from succeeding.

entry.title: Deep Rock Galactic v0.18.3
entry.content:
**Changes (Compatible with previous 0.18 Versions)**
- Added Better Filler Items - Fixed Various in game UI syncs - Small bugfixes
**INFO FILES** [INSTRUCTIONS](https://docs.google.com/document/d/16At-2kS_azJRf9PdUcZeA8Esfoh6kNm2dWVWy8u8wA0/edit?usp=sharing) [MOD on MOD.IO](https://mod.io/g/drg/m/test-archipelago-integration#description) [SIDELOADER for DRG Mods](https://github.com/trumank/mint)

entry.title: Pokemon Crystal v5.4.4
entry.content:
# Changelog
Since [5.4.3](https://github.com/gerbiljames/Archipelago-Crystal/releases/tag/5.4.3)
## Bug Fixes - Fix Universal Tracker not working for seeds generated before 5.4.3
_This release is backwards compatible with seeds generated on 5.4.0 or later. Some fixes are retroactive, re-patch your ROM to benefit from them._

entry.title: Resident Evil 7 v0.3.4
entry.content: Fixed 2 locations error's that could happen. (The Kitchen from the Shipwreck being though being in the same place as the Kitchen from Chapter 2) and an logic error in the Old House.

entry.title: Pharcryption v1.1.0
entry.content: This is a fork of the original apworld by ThePhar. This APWorld got modernized and got improved a bit (more reliable). As usual, these are to tie us over until ThePhar gets back to this. I am not going to be a full time maintainer.

entry.title: Brotato v0.14.1
entry.content:
This is a GUI update to present additional information to the player and clean up a few graphical oddities caused by the mod.
## Added
- The "Connect" menu has been renamed to the "AP" menu and additional information has been added to it. - The Progress panel previously shown on the character select screen has been moved here. - A new Slot Data panel now shows the slot data when connected. - A new Options panel has been added for mod-specific configuration. - Deathlink can now be set from the Options page to one of three modes: - Use the value set in the slot data/player options. - Force Deathlink on. - Force Deathlink off. - Added a section to the Options panel to help with bug reporting: - Instructions on the best way to report feedback (in the Archipelago Discord). - A button to open the log file's location. - This is especially relevant now that Brotato has cross-platform builds. - A button to open the Brotato game development channel on the Archipelago Discord.
## Changed
- Disable the address, olayer, and password edit boxes in the connect UI when connecting/connected to an AP server.
## Fixed
- Fixed the main menu not initializing properly when the Archipelago mod was enabled. - Fixed the character select screen constantly changing size when mousing over characters. - Unfortunately, the fix for this was to remove the Progress panel from the UI. The base game's UI is wider now due to the animated character portraits, and there's not enough horizontal space for the AP data. I may add this back in at some point if I think of a better way to handle it.

entry.title: The Legend of Zelda - Oracle of Seasons v20.1.13
entry.content: ## ⏫ New sprite loader - A new sprite editor is added as a component on the Archipelago launcher - Editing the sprite will have to be done in a specialized software, with the tool giving a link sprite in different colors it can be played with. Keep in mind link's color are as varied as they possibly could be, it is impossible to have for example green and red on the same sprite, or use a different color - Once ready, the sprite editor can select it as default under the selected colors for either Seasons or Ages

entry.title: Deltarune v1.2.2
entry.content:
**Only Chapter 1 and 2 are available for now**
(This APWorld is intended for DELTARUNE 1.04. Using a Beta or the Ch1+2 Demo will not work.)
**>>> This is an unstable pre-release. For asyncs/syncs, we recommend using version v1.2.1 instead. <<<**
Changelog:
- In-game client - Probably other things i forgot - Egg, moss, shadowcrystal are now filler - Added an option to include unused items to itempool (can exclude Everybodyweapon) - [CH3] Lost Pippins, Zapper, Watercooler, Shuttah and shadowguy are now in logic only in tv world if you are playing all routes (so you can recruit them before losing them without the need to reload save. They are marked out of logic on UT if you want to reload your save) - Begin of porting game mod to a patching framework to making it open source, only chapter 1 and chapter select are currently done - Now display location item name reward in game and in shops (some places may be missing) - [CH1] BakeSale save point have been moved to be before the story blocker - [CH1] Leaving Man's room now go to the same room before entering - [CH1] Re-did Castle Key NPC blocker - [CH1] Added some easter eggs to Kris Room (Thanks @Charaster-Official for the Archipelago trophy and keucher-mod for the flags) - [CH1] Weapons storage is now up to 48 - [CH1] Armor storage is now up to 60 - [CH2] Moved back to castle town to be closer to a warp - [CH2] Add new savepoints

entry.title: Factorio Bob's v2.2.1
entry.content: Fixes mod crashing with random recipe times

entry.title: Cuphead v0.2.16908799
entry.content:
**To see notes and what's new for alpha03, see [alpha03a](https://github.com/JKLeckr/Archipelago-cuphead/releases/tag/alpha03a)**
### Revision
This revision overhauls weapon setup in the item pool, which fixes several issues with weapons not being correctly in the item pool. This revision also fixes some issues with level_placements.

entry.title: Okami HD v0.3.4
entry.content:
# Okami HD APWorld 0.3.4
## What's Changed * Remap Kamiki chests ids, move west Islands to regular Kamiki, rename … by @Ragmoa in https://github.com/Ragmoa/Archipelago/pull/24 * Ensure that Kamiki merchant is open before making its random items avilable in logic by @Ragmoa in https://github.com/Ragmoa/Archipelago/pull/25 * Set not implemented options to false by default/ remove additional divine instrument precollected by @Ragmoa in https://github.com/Ragmoa/Archipelago/pull/27 * Fix/shinshu valley checks issues by @Ragmoa in https://github.com/Ragmoa/Archipelago/pull/29
**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/Ragmoa/Archipelago/compare/0.3.3...0.3.4

entry.title: plateup v0.2.6.3
entry.content:
## What's New? - Added `random_research` — research desk randomisation can now be enabled from the YAML. This is off by default - Added progressive day leases — when enabled, the first Day Lease for each food is required from Day 1, effectively making it act like a food unlock and helping prevent players from being locked out of foods after franchising - Day and franchise logic now has softer progression gates. A day block can now be considered in logic if you have any of the following: - enough relevant Day Leases - any speed upgrade - at least 3 named appliance unlocks, when appliance unlocks are enabled - Dish-day and franchise-day gates now both use the new block logic - "Lose a Run" is now excluded from progression placement for both franchise and complete-days goals, keeping it filler-only - Added slot data support for `random_research` and `day_leases_progressive` so the client can correctly receive both settings
## New YAML Options
**`random_research`** — Enables random research mode. When enabled, the research desk randomly researches into any appliance in the pool instead of following the fixed progression path. When disabled, the research desk works as in vanilla. Defaults to `false`.
```yaml random_research: # Enable random research mode. # When enabled, the research desk randomly researches into any appliance in the pool instead of the fixed progression path. # When disabled, the research desk works as in vanilla. 'false': 50 'true': 0 ```
**day_leases_progressive** — Makes day leases act as progressive items. When enabled, the first lease for each food or dish is required to play even Day 1. This makes the first lease act as an unlock, helping prevent players from starting a food freely and then becoming gated mid-run after franchising elsewhere. Only relevant when **day_leases_enabled** is on. Defaults to **false**.
```yaml day_leases_progressive: # Make day leases act as progressive items: the first lease for each food/dish is required to play even Day 1. # When enabled, leases_required = ceil(day / interval) — every day block requires at least one lease, so the # first lease acts as an unlock, preventing players from starting a food freely and then being gated mid-run. # When disabled (default), the first block of days (1 to interval) is free, and leases gate subsequent blocks. # This can help prevent players from being locked out of foods after franchising elsewhere. # Only relevant when day_leases_enabled is on. 'false': 50 'true': 0 ```
## Logic Changes
Day blocks now have more flexible access rules. Instead of only checking for the required number of leases, a block may be in logic if the player has one of several forms of progression:
- enough Day Leases for that block - any speed upgrade - enough named appliance unlocks, capped at min(3, day_lease_interval)
This should make progression feel less brittle, especially when appliance unlocks are enabled or when players receive useful speed upgrades early.
[Mod Update 0.2.6.3](https://github.com/CazIsABoi/PlateUpAPMod/releases/tag/0.2.6.3)

entry.title: Minecraft Fabric v1.1.1
entry.content: - Fixed Oversight with Healing Pretty Good Advancements that made the mod not work in syncs - Fixed Cogs still being craftable when Cogwheels are locked (Create Mod) - Updated Logic for Red Sand Items when Create is present - Music Disc Heartstep (Healing Pretty Good) is now excluded with other music discs - Relocked a debug command that was accidentally left enabled - Fishing Rod Recipes now also locks carrot on a stick and warped fungus on a stick - Fixed Logic Error for Netherite Block - Added TNT recipes as a progression item - All Netherite Items now require TNT to be considered in Logic - Added two new progression Items for Create: - Sand Paper Recipes - Blaze Burners - Added two new junk items for Minecraft: - Copper Ore Vein - Large Copper Ore Vein - The following blocks now can’t be broken without their proper check: - Brewing Stand - Grindstone - Stonecutter - Loom - Cartography Table - Smithing Table - Beds - Respawn Anchor - Anvil - Enchanting Table - Added additional Itemsanity Exclusion Options for the following: - Flowers - Slabs - Stairs - Walls / Fences / Fence Gates

entry.title: Scooby-Doo! Night of 100 Frights v1
entry.content:
# QOL Fix Release
- Fixes some logic issues in Cellar 4 for both entry from Cellar 3 and for the High Up Snackbox in snacksanity not requiring Springs
